description: The validation story: one-shot throwaway migration SCRIPT (core field map, blocker reciprocal-edge reconstruction, config map, branch handling) + each plugin's one-time adoption, then run it on THIS repo's balls data, hand off to prime, install greenfield, cut over. Proves the design end-to-end. NOT a verb. Refuses if any task is claimed / balls already exists.
